description: Use this API to change a substation switched shunt node terminal connection in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = station_sws_shunt_term_chng_2(bus, id, intgar)

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Number of the bus to which the switched shunt is connected. (input).

error_codes.description: switched shunt identifier is more than two characters.
bus does not belong to a substation.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
error when moving switched shunt terminal connection.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
